hero.label: CONTACT
hero.headline: Let's Start The Conversation.
hero.subtitle: Whether you are searching for a home, exploring an investment, or planning from abroad — our team is ready to guide you with discretion and expertise.

image.alt: Luxury sales lounge reception at Citrine Heights

welcome.headline: Every Great Investment Begins With A Conversation.
welcome.paragraph: At Citrine Heights, we believe the journey to your future home should feel as considered as the residence itself. Our private consultation process is designed around you — your timeline, your questions, and your vision. No pressure. No generic sales pitch. Just honest guidance from a team that knows this address inside and out.

salesGallery.label: VISIT OUR SALES GALLERY
salesGallery.headline: Walk through your future address.
salesGallery.description: Our sales gallery on Westlands Road offers an immersive preview of Citrine Heights — from architectural models and material samples to virtual walkthroughs of every residence type.
salesGallery.address: Westlands Road, Opposite GTC, Westlands, Nairobi, Kenya
salesGallery.openingHours: Monday - Saturday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM | Sunday: By Appointment

items.question: Can I buy a residence while living abroad?
items.answer: Yes. Our diaspora team specialises in remote purchases for buyers in the UK, US, Canada, UAE, and beyond. We offer virtual viewings, secure document handling, and flexible payment plans designed for international clients.

items.question: Do you offer virtual viewings?
items.answer: Absolutely. We conduct live video walkthroughs of the sales gallery, show units, and available residences. You can also request a recorded tour tailored to your preferred unit type.

items.question: Do I need an appointment to visit?
items.answer: Walk-ins are welcome during opening hours, but we recommend booking an appointment to ensure a dedicated advisor is available for your visit. Private consultations receive our full attention.

items.question: What documentation is required to reserve a unit?
items.answer: A valid national ID or passport, proof of address, and a reservation deposit. Our team will guide you through the full legal and conveyancing process with our appointed advocates.

items.question: Are financing options available?
items.answer: We work with leading Kenyan banks and offer flexible developer payment plans. Our team can connect you with mortgage advisors and provide payment schedule documentation for your review.

items.question: How do I request a brochure or floor plans?
items.answer: Use our Download Centre below or submit a consultation request. We will send the materials to your email within one business day, along with current pricing and availability.

items.question: Where exactly is Citrine Heights located?
items.answer: Citrine Heights is on Westlands Road, directly opposite GTC in Nairobi's premier business and lifestyle district. The development is minutes from Westgate Mall, Sarit Centre, and major embassies.

responsePromise.headline: We Respond Within One Business Day.
responsePromise.paragraph: Every enquiry receives personal attention from a dedicated advisor — not an automated reply. We understand that purchasing a residence is one of life's most significant decisions, and we honour that with timely, thoughtful communication.
